title: SmartHome Appliances
description: Minecraft mod about smart home that adds smart lamp, led panels, switches and so much more!
body:
## SmartHome Appliances

Smart home appliances is a mod about getting smart home tools into your minecraft builds!

With it you can setup multiple different colored lamps or led panels and connect them to switch, that allows you to control them at same time.

Please, check gallery for small tutorial.
